title: Kid-friendly Algerian Water Tagine
description: A simple, wholesome Algerian dish that's perfect for kids, featuring a briny cheese-pull broth served with crusty bread.
instructions: Bring the milk and water to a boil in a large saucepan on medium-high heat.
Reduce heat to medium-low and whisk constantly for 5 minutes, or until the mixture thickens slightly and forms a smooth, creamy sauce.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in the flour until well combined.
Return the saucepan to low heat and whisk continuously for 2-3 minutes, or until the sauce thickens further and a light cheese pull forms.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and let cool for a minute or two before serving hot with crusty bread.
Serve the Water Tagine immediately, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or cilantro if desired.
